Personal Information

Category

Payment and Billing

Card Details

Stripe Payment Element handles card number, expiry, and CVC automatically. Billing details can be controlled with `fields.billingDetails` (`auto`, `if_required`, or `never`), and full billing address capture is best paired with Address Element in billing mode.

Stripe card fields mount area (Payment Element)
Payment Element billing details Address Element docs

Security

  • Forgot Password

    Request a password reset flow from support or account recovery.

  • Change Password

    Update your password and rotate account access credentials.

  • Logout All Sessions

    End your active session now and force re-authentication on every device.

    Attribution Pipeline

    How registration mapping drives hidden sponsor-line discount and binary attribution

    1

    Step 1 - Registration Mapping

    Member registration assigns sponsor-line routing in the background.

    Bind

    Captured

    2

    Step 2 - Hidden Application

    Checkout automatically applies the assigned sponsor line for discount logic.

    Session

    Validated

    3

    Step 3 - Internal Attribution Key

    Invoice stores internal routing metadata and sponsor credit mapping.

    Invoice

    Committed

    Step 4

    System credits revenue and BP through the sponsor line so binary points can roll up.

    Attribution Health

    Operational quality checks

    Link-to-Invoice Match 97%
    Code Capture Reliability 99%
    Attribution Exceptions 2%

    Analytics Notes

    Quick interpretation of current metrics

    • Pending revenue concentration is mainly from larger baskets.
    • BP growth tracks directly with invoice volume in this draft view.

    Store Setup

    Manage your guest-facing store identity while internal attribution stays locked.

    Registration Mapping

    Sponsor-line routing is assigned during member registration.

    Internal store code keys are hidden from member UI.

    Public Store Code

    CHG-ZERO

    Share this code with anonymous or guest buyers.

    Store code copied.

    Public Store Link

    shop.premierelife.com?store=CHG-ZERO

    Send this link to guests to auto-apply your public store identity.

    Store link copied.

    Upline Visibility

    Members only know their upline relationship.

    Underlying internal routing values are not exposed in cart/checkout.

    Setup Notes

    Store governance and attribution reminders

    • Sponsor mapping is fixed when member registration is completed.
    • Public store code/link can be shared with anonymous and guest users.
    • Members cannot view or edit internal store code routing values in cart/checkout.
    • Discount and BP attribution are applied automatically to the assigned sponsor line.
